column1: We got his letters regularly. The letters____________by post. (SEND)
Books were expensive because they___________out by hand. (COPY)
Morse code_________once widely______to send telegraph messages, it_____sometimes___________now. (USE/USE)
Thousands of Americans rushed into Alaska when gold_____________there. (DISCOVER)
A lullaby is a song that_____________to help babies to fall asleep. (SING)
